name: grep
description: Search file contents using ripgrep for function/class/variable definitions, imports, error messages, or any text pattern in code. Use this for content search. For filename search, use glob instead. For directory structure, use tree instead.

pattern.description: Search pattern (regex by default, use --literal for exact text)

type.description: File type filter: go, py, ts, js, etc. (repeatable, use without dots)

literal.description: Treat pattern as literal text, not regex

context.description: Show N lines of context around each match

name: glob
description: Search for files by name pattern using fd. Use this to find files by extension or name. For searching file contents, use grep instead. For directory structure, use tree instead.

type.description: Type filter: f=files only, d=directories only

name: tree
description: Display directory structure as a tree view. Use this to understand project layout and organization. For searching file contents, use grep instead. For searching filenames, use glob instead.

name: check
description: Verify that required dependencies (ripgrep, fd, tree) are installed and accessible. Use this before running search commands to ensure all tools are available.
